_comment: This JSON mirrors the Postgres tables in database/schema.sql. It is the contract between front end and back end. The browser demo loads an inline copy of this (see js/data.js) so it runs by double-clicking index.html with no server. DEMO passwords are plaintext here ONLY so you can log in easily; the running app hashes them in memory and a real backend uses Supabase Auth.

recordings.title: Onboarding flow walkthrough
recordings.script_text: Show the signup screen, then the empty dashboard, then record one demo.

recordings.title: Bug repro: upload retry
recordings.script_text: Trigger an upload failure and show the blob is kept for retry.

recordings.title: Sprint update - week 23
recordings.script_text: Quick async status: shipped, blocked, next.
